{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kortali
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kortali]] was destroyed almost twenty years ago.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Kortali was destroyed almost twenty years gone.”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
